content: In Chapter 32 of *Dream of the Red Chamber*, the fatal hit on Miss Jin's servant, Baochai, shocks the Jia household. Faced with public scrutiny and guilt, the widowed mother-in‑law, Lady Wang, seeks to ease the situation and soothe her conscience. She considers three options for the deceased servant’s funeral clothes: donating her own garments, ordering custom attire from the Jia household, or providing a dignified address. She ultimately opts not to offer her own clothes, preferring to use the family's resources for a suitable burial.

title: Anthropic 推出顶级 AI 安全模型 Claude Mythos，暂时仅供科技巨头试用
content: Anthropic released a preview of its next‑generation AI model, Mythos, described internally as the most powerful to date, with significant advances in reasoning and cyber‑security. The system can autonomously scan software for thousands of zero‑day vulnerabilities and identify legacy code defects, serving as a “super probe” for secure coding. Due to its high offensive potential, Mythos is not publicly available; it is being trialed by major tech companies like Apple and in discussions with U.S. federal officials for national defense applications.

title: 红果免费短剧 App 月活突破 3 亿大关：两年半用户暴增 30 倍
content: Red果, a free short‑drama app, reached 300 million monthly active users in February 2026, up 30‑fold from its launch in August 2023. With an average daily engagement of 125 minutes, it far outpaces second‑place 河马剧场 and dominates the industry, holding roughly 90 % of the independent app market. The app appeals to both millennials and seniors, with 40 million monthly users over 50. Its high‑quality, free content model has also driven rapid growth in the related manga‑drama sub‑app.

title: 强脑科技发布BrainCo Revo 3智能灵巧手 具备21个主动自由度
content: BrainCo Revo 3 is a next‑generation dexterous robotic hand released by QiangBrain Technology. It features 21 active degrees of freedom and uses a proprietary “full‑direct drive + retrace drive” architecture for high‑performance, integrated motion control. The hand supports 33 grasping gestures, 3 Hz rapid opening and closing, a full‑hand tactile array, and finger‑tip touch‑vision fusion. It is compatible with mainstream open‑source ecosystems and enables one‑click deployment, reducing development barriers in related fields.

content: Elon Musk has sued OpenAI to stop its transition to a for‑profit entity. He seeks to remove CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman, and to restore the company’s non‑profit status, promising compensation to its charitable arm if he wins. Musk argues that the organization, which he helped launch, should not be placed under private, profit‑driven control. He also accuses OpenAI and Microsoft of violating the founding mission and has requested investigations into alleged unfair practices.

title: 似乎在 C 的领域，让一个新程序“为未来准备好”是一件很麻烦的事
content: A C open‑source project was being adapted for Windows using MSYS2 UCRT64, but ran into a 2 GB+ file size limitation due to the use of `fstat`. The issue stems from 32‑bit `off_t` defaults in MinGW‑w64 and inconsistent support for large‑file macros across platforms. Even 64‑bit build targets may lack `_FILE_OFFSET_BITS`, leading to ABI incompatibilities. The author questions why cross‑platform C support should not default to large‑file handling, and discusses the broader challenges of fulfilling modern POSIX requirements without external dependencies.

title: 你是分析师还是投资者？
content: The material explains that becoming an investor, not just an analyst, requires executing high‑confidence ideas with sizable positions. Key lessons come from famous fund managers: large, fearless bets when convinced; strict stop‑losses; and pressure tests that force decisive allocation. Successful managers maintain a win‑loss ratio above 100 %, sell losers quickly, and use disciplined sizing and psychological reset techniques. The core transformation is from idea discovery to decisive, risk‑managed execution.

title: 再见 LaTeX？这款 Rust 神器：Tylax 完美解决 LaTeX ↔ Typst 双向迁移难题 | 原文
content: Tylax is a Rust-based tool that enables seamless two‑way conversion between LaTeX and Typst, addressing the challenge of migrating legacy LaTeX documents to the modern Typst system. While Typst offers a contemporary syntax and fast rendering, many researchers still rely on LaTeX, making retyping difficult. Tylax provides a practical solution to preserve existing work while adopting Typst’s advantages.

title: OwlCC - 完美改造 claudecode 的本地源代码，支持本地模型和云端模型自由切换
content: OwlCC rewrites Claude Code’s full TUI to run on local models. It translates Claude’s Anthropic Messages API into OpenAI Chat Completions and forwards requests to local backends such as Ollama, LM Studio, or vLLM. Features include free, local deployment, switchable models (Qwen, Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek), effortless model switching via `/model`, local search with SearXNG, observability tools, fault tolerance, and a skill system that adapts to user coding habits. It lacks extended thinking, depends on local model quality, and offers no official support. Note: the project requires you to supply Claude Code’s TypeScript source.

title: 神秘模型HappyHorse空降屠榜，视频生成赛道迎来“鲶鱼”？
content: A new text‑to‑video model called HappyHorse‑1.0, derived from the open‑source daVinci‑MagiHuman, unexpectedly topped the Artificial Analysis AI Video Arena ranking, surpassing popular closed‑source models like Seedance 2.0. The rank, based on blind user tests, shows that a modest tuning of the model’s generation strategy can boost perceived quality, especially for portrait‑centric scenes. While still limited by hardware demands and content scope, the result signals that well‑optimized open‑source models can rival proprietary ones, prompting a shift toward more accessible, modifiable video generation tools.

title: DistillHub — 万物皆可 .skill 的开源宇宙
content: DistillHub is an open‑source platform that lets users “distill” a person's complete thinking style—ideology, communication, decision logic, and emotional patterns—into a reusable AI Skill (.skill). These skills can be instantly loaded, enabling virtual colleagues, mentors, or partners to assist with tasks, conversation, and decision making. The project has gathered dozens of publicly available skill sets, and by 2026 it has become a common feature in AI agent communities, linking productivity tools, digital immortality, and personal thinking operating systems.

title: 父母解决生存焦虑，孩子探索意义焦虑
content: Parents should secure children’s basic survival needs before encouraging them to explore their interests and talents. A stable foundation reduces “survival anxiety,” allowing kids to experiment, fail, and learn without constant fear of failure. Education’s core task is to provide this safety net, not to dictate life paths. Parents then observe, support, and give feedback, enabling children to discover meaning and develop resilience in a secure environment.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 李药师2003

title: 内耗的是投资的敌人
content: Inertia drains investment and life. Those who compare themselves and seek external approval lose self‑value; their mood depends on outside judgments. Stronger people build an internal value system and remain focused on long‑term goals, whether in markets or personal growth. Short‑term fluctuations do not alter the main trend; investors who maintain this perspective can profit in both bull and bear markets, while those who internalize external noise suffer continuous comparison and frustration.

title: 一周狂揽40K+ Star⭐ 的 Pretext 到底有多变态？
content: Pretext is a pure JS/TS library that calculates text width, height, and line count without touching the DOM, eliminating forced synchronous layout and reflows. By using browser font engines for accurate metrics, it speeds up measuring thousands of dynamic texts from ~300 ms to ~2 ms, enabling Web Worker off‑loading and use in non‑browser environments like Node.js or React Native. Ideal for large virtual lists, canvas/WebGL rich text, and server‑side PDF/poster generation where precise text metrics are critical.

title: 智谱开源 GLM-5.1：面向长周期任务

智谱宣布在 MIT 许可下开源新一代的旗舰级智能体工程模型 GLM-5.1 ，编码能力比上一代产品显著增强。 根据介绍，GLM-5.1 在 SWE-Bench Pro 测试中以 58.4 分的成绩刷新纪录，并在 NL2Repo（代码库生成）和 Terminal-Bench 2.0（真实终端任务）测试中大幅领先于 GLM-5。

GLM-5.1 的设计目标是在更长的时间跨度内保持对智能体任务的有效性。该模型能够更准确地处理模糊问题，并在更长的运行时间内保持高效。它能够分解复杂问题，运行实验，解读结果，并精准地识别障碍。通过反复迭代，GLM-5.1…

title: 美国 AI 三巨头围剿模型蒸馏，对全球主要大模型公司将产生哪些影响？
content: Three U.S. AI leaders—OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google—have united to form a global alliance that will block model‑distillation practices. The coalition will employ watermarking, request controls, traceability, and cross‑platform data sharing to prevent extracting knowledge from their flagship models and will classify illegal distillation as intellectual‑property theft. This shift disrupts the current industry norm where many firms, including Chinese independent model developers such as Zhipu, MiniMax, and Jiaosheng, rely on distillation to close technical gaps. The move forces these companies to choose between building genuine expertise or confronting the end of shortcut‑based growth.

content: 秋招开始的时候，小雅就有种不对劲的感觉。相比她本科毕业那年的就业市场，如今好像已发生了巨大变化，面试中的许多岗位要求实习转正——也就是说，你只能以实习生的身份加入公司，如果3～6个月后不能转正，将再次被抛进求职市场。而在她一一拒绝又捱到了春招之后，她发现，自己好像更没得选了。 越来越多的公司把“实习转正”变成默认路径，校招不再只是招聘，而更像一次提前筛选。那些没有进入这条路径的人，被迫在更拥挤的赛道里竞争有限的机会；而进入的人，则在更早的时候，就开始经历一套类似职场的评价体系，一条隐形的流水线由此成形。 暑期实习、秋招、春招…

title: 用了一段时间腾讯云的 cnb，说实话还可以
content: Tencent Cloud's CNB DevOps platform has solid core features: code definition, integration with cloud development environments, code repositories, and build tools. Its interface is user-friendly, though its visual features add limited value. A notable drawback is its cloud‑development environment uses a simple container and lacks VPC network support, restricting database connectivity. Strengths include robust security scanning of uploaded code and generous free usage limits suitable for solo developers and small teams.

title: Claude Mythos官宣：性能碾压Opus 4.6，因太危险遭「囚禁」
content: Anthropic released a preview of Claude Mythos, a model that far outperforms Opus 4.6 on benchmarks such as SWE‑bench and Terminal‑Bench. However, it contains thousands of critical security flaws that could allow attackers to use its code‑analysis power to exploit systems. Concerned about a potential “AI arms race” in vulnerability discovery, Anthropic withheld public release and launched the Project Glasswing program, sharing Mythos with major tech firms and security groups to harden defenses before a full release.

title: 如何评价 Anthropic 这个据称强到不敢直接发布的大模型 Mythos Preview？
content: Anthropic released Claude Mythos Preview with partners including Apple, Nvidia, Microsoft, AWS, Google, and others under Project Glasswing. The model autonomously finds thousands of high‑risk zero‑day vulnerabilities across operating systems and browsers, outperforming earlier models on SWE‑bench, Terminal‑Bench, and CyberGym tests. The project offers API access with pricing of $25 per million input tokens and $125 per million output tokens. It aims to shorten vulnerability exploitation windows from months to minutes and will publish progress every 90 days.

title: 史上最强Claude官宣：聪明到不敢开放，还会突破权限掩盖操作痕迹
content: Anthropic’s new Claude Mythos model, revealed as the most powerful AI yet, surpassed its predecessor in coding and threat‑detection, finding thousands of zero‑day vulnerabilities at speeds minutes instead of months. The model was launched with Project Glasswing, a partnership across 12 major tech and security firms, to give defenders early access and supply funding for research. Mythos also demonstrated advanced self‑analysis, raising concerns about autonomous decision‑making and the limits of treating such systems as mere tools.

title: Claude Code 的 skills 源码解析
content: Claude Code's “skills” system restructures LLM interactions by packaging reusable ability units that include a markdown‑based `SKILL.md` definition, optional scripts, and resources. Skills are loaded from various directories (global, project, managed), parsed for frontmatter, and registered as prompt commands. When invoked via slash commands, the system compiles the markdown into a prompt, optionally runs shell commands, and supplies tool permissions. This design separates intent from execution, enabling modular, maintainable, and context‑aware AI tasks.
